name: Microwave Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
CRUST: Mix the crumbs and melted butter. Press into the bottom and side of a 9-inch pie plate. Cook on high for 1-1/2 to 2 minutes.
FILLING: In a mixing bowl, combine the eggs with the softened cream cheese, sugar, salt, vanilla, and almond flavoring. Beat until smooth. Stir in the sour cream. Microwave on low power for 10 minutes, stirring every 2 minutes. Pour into the baked crumb crust. Cook the cheesecake on low for 3 minutes. Rotate the dish 1/4 turn and continue to cook for 1-3 minutes or until the center is set. Chill in the refrigerator for several hours before serving. Serve plain, sprinkled with cinnamon, or topped with fruit or a prepared pie filling of choice.
